fullHistory.content:
Hey! I'm Roba Copilot — ready to help you build something innovative. Here's what we can do:

🤖 Custom Robot Design
"Design a robot that can water plants in my garden"
"Create a small robot companion that follows me around the house"
"Build a robot arm that can sort Lego bricks by color"

⚙️ Physics & Simulation
"Simulate how a robot walks on different terrains like sand and gravel"
"Test the stability of a four-wheeled robot going over small obstacles"
"See how changing the mass affects the robot's balance when turning"

🛠️ Build & Experiment
"Experiment with different wheel sizes to see which is fastest on carpet"
"Try adding a sensor to detect edges and prevent falls"
"Modify the robot's weight distribution to improve climbing ability"
make the 4 wheeler look like an actual RC car with realistic body and wheels
